leak_repair.description: Fixing leaking pipes, faucets, and water connections in kitchens and bathrooms.

drain_cleaning.description: Removing clogs in sinks, showers, toilets, and main drain lines.

toilet_repair.description: Repairing flushing issues, leaks, and toilet installation problems.

water_heater_service.description: Inspection and repair of household water heating systems.

emergency_plumbing.description: 24/7 urgent plumbing support for flooding, burst pipes, and severe leaks.

kitchen_drain_unclogging.description: Removing blockages from a kitchen sink drain to restore normal water flow

pipe_installation.description: Installing new water pipes for kitchens, bathrooms, or renovations.

bathroom_plumbing.description: Full bathroom plumbing services including installation and repair.

water_leak_detection.description: Advanced detection of hidden leaks using specialized tools.

sewer_line_repair.description: Repair and maintenance of main sewer lines.

radiator_installation.description: Installation and replacement of home radiators.

pipe_insulation.description: Insulating pipes to prevent freezing and heat loss.

gas_line_inspection.description: Inspection of gas pipelines for safety compliance.

policies.working_hours: We operate Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM.
policies.emergency_hours: Emergency plumbing is available 24/7 including weekends.
policies.cancellation: Appointments can be cancelled free of charge up to 24 hours in advance.
policies.late_arrival: If the customer is more than 15 minutes late, the appointment may be rescheduled.
policies.payment_methods: We accept cash, bank transfer, and PayPal after service completion.
policies.invoice: Invoices are provided upon request for all services.
policies.travel_fee: A small travel fee may apply outside central Hamburg.
policies.general_update: How much is the leak repair - It costs €81/hour
policies.warranty: We provide a 6-month warranty on most repair services.
policies.response_time: Standard service requests are handled within 24–48 hours.
policies.emergency_priority: Emergency cases are prioritized over standard bookings.
policies.materials_policy: Material costs are billed separately if required.
policies.inspection_fee: A small inspection fee may apply if no repair is performed.
policies.reschedule_policy: Appointments can be rescheduled at least 12 hours in advance.
policies.safety_policy: Our technicians follow strict safety and hygiene standards.

faqs.q: What areas do you serve?
faqs.a: We serve Hamburg and nearby surrounding areas.

faqs.q: What are your working hours?
faqs.a: We operate Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM.

faqs.q: Do you offer emergency plumbing?
faqs.a: Yes, we provide 24/7 emergency plumbing support.

faqs.q: How much does a plumbing repair cost?
faqs.a: Our standard plumbing repair starts at €80 per hour.

faqs.q: Do you charge extra for emergency calls?
faqs.a: Yes, emergency services are charged at €120 per hour.

faqs.q: Can I book an appointment by email?
faqs.a: Yes, simply email us your issue and preferred time slot.

faqs.q: Do you repair leaking faucets?
faqs.a: Yes, we repair leaking taps and replace faulty parts.

faqs.q: How fast can you respond to emergencies?
faqs.a: We aim to respond within 1–2 hours depending on location and workload.

faqs.q: Do you clean clogged drains?
faqs.a: Yes, we provide drain cleaning for sinks, showers, and toilets.

faqs.q: Do you fix burst pipes?
faqs.a: Yes, burst pipe repair is one of our emergency services.

faqs.q: Can you install a new toilet?
faqs.a: Yes, we offer toilet installation and replacement services.

faqs.q: Do you repair toilets that keep running?
faqs.a: Yes, we can fix flushing and running water issues.

faqs.q: Can you help with low water pressure?
faqs.a: Yes, we can inspect and resolve low pressure problems.

faqs.q: Do you service water heaters?
faqs.a: Yes, we inspect and repair household water heaters.

faqs.q: Can you replace old pipes?
faqs.a: Yes, we provide pipe replacement and upgrades when needed.

faqs.q: Do you work on weekends?
faqs.a: Only emergency services are available on weekends.

faqs.q: Is there a travel fee?
faqs.a: A small travel fee may apply outside central Hamburg.

faqs.q: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.a: We accept cash, bank transfer, and PayPal.

faqs.q: Do you provide invoices?
faqs.a: Yes, invoices are available upon request.

faqs.q: Can I cancel my appointment?
faqs.a: Yes, cancellations are free up to 24 hours before the appointment.

faqs.q: What happens if I cancel late?
faqs.a: Late cancellations may incur a small service fee.

faqs.q: Can you fix a leaking shower?
faqs.a: Yes, we repair leaks in showers and bathtubs.

faqs.q: Do you unclog toilets?
faqs.a: Yes, toilet clog removal is part of our drain cleaning services.

faqs.q: Can you repair kitchen sink leaks?
faqs.a: Yes, kitchen plumbing repair is a common service we provide.

faqs.q: Do you replace broken faucets?
faqs.a: Yes, faucet replacement is available if repair is not possible.

faqs.q: How long does a typical repair take?
faqs.a: Most small repairs take 1–2 hours depending on complexity.

faqs.q: Do you provide free estimates?
faqs.a: We can provide an estimate after understanding the issue.

faqs.q: Can you inspect my plumbing system?
faqs.a: Yes, we offer plumbing inspections for households.

faqs.q: Do you handle apartment building plumbing?
faqs.a: Yes, we support both private homes and small apartment buildings.

faqs.q: Can you help with flooding?
faqs.a: Yes, flooding and water damage emergencies are handled immediately.

faqs.q: Do you repair washing machine connections?
faqs.a: Yes, we fix and replace washing machine water connections.

faqs.q: Do you repair dishwasher plumbing issues?
faqs.a: Yes, dishwasher leaks and drainage issues are supported.

faqs.q: Can you install a new sink?
faqs.a: Yes, sink installation is available upon request.

faqs.q: Do you fix noisy pipes?
faqs.a: Yes, we can diagnose and reduce pipe vibration or noise.

faqs.q: Can you remove bad odors from drains?
faqs.a: Yes, drain cleaning often resolves odor issues.

faqs.q: Do you offer preventive maintenance?
faqs.a: Yes, we provide maintenance services to prevent future problems.

faqs.q: Do you work with landlords and property managers?
faqs.a: Yes, we frequently support rental property maintenance.

faqs.q: Can you help with bathroom renovation plumbing?
faqs.a: Yes, we support plumbing work during renovations.

faqs.q: Do you repair radiator leaks?
faqs.a: Yes, minor heating-related plumbing leaks can be handled.

faqs.q: Can you install water filters?
faqs.a: Yes, water filter installation is available.

faqs.q: Do you fix outdoor plumbing issues?
faqs.a: Yes, we handle outdoor pipes and garden water systems.

faqs.q: Do you replace shower heads?
faqs.a: Yes, shower fixture replacement is available.

faqs.q: Can you fix blocked main sewer lines?
faqs.a: Yes, severe blockages may require specialized drain cleaning.

faqs.q: How do I know if I have a hidden leak?
faqs.a: Signs include damp walls, mold, or unexplained water bills.

faqs.q: Do you offer same-day service?
faqs.a: Same-day service may be available depending on schedule.

faqs.q: How do I book the fastest appointment?
faqs.a: Email us with your issue and urgency, and we will confirm the earliest slot.

faqs.q: Can you recommend what to do before you arrive?
faqs.a: Yes, we may suggest shutting off the main water valve in emergencies.

faqs.q: Do you provide English support?
faqs.a: Yes, we can communicate in English for international customers.

faqs.q: What should I include in my email request?
faqs.a: Please include your address, issue description, and preferred appointment time.

faqs.q: Do you guarantee your repairs?
faqs.a: Yes, we stand by our work and offer a service guarantee on repairs.

faqs.q: Do you have the female workers?
faqs.a: Yes, we have. We have 3 female repairman in our company.

faqs.q: Do you offer fixed prices?
faqs.a: Some services have fixed pricing, while others depend on the complexity.

faqs.q: Are there any hidden costs?
faqs.a: No, all costs are communicated clearly before starting the work.

faqs.q: Is VAT included in your prices?
faqs.a: Yes, all prices include VAT unless otherwise stated.

faqs.q: Do you charge for inspection visits?
faqs.a: An inspection fee may apply if no repair is carried out.

faqs.q: Do you offer fixed prices?
faqs.a: Some services have fixed pricing, while others depend on the complexity.

faqs.q: Are there any hidden costs?
faqs.a: No, all costs are communicated clearly before starting the work.

faqs.q: Is VAT included in your prices?
faqs.a: Yes, all prices include VAT unless otherwise stated.

faqs.q: Do you charge for inspection visits?
faqs.a: An inspection fee may apply if no repair is carried out.

faqs.q: How quickly can I get an appointment?
faqs.a: Usually within 1–2 business days depending on availability.

faqs.q: Do you have female technicians?
faqs.a: Yes, we have trained female technicians available upon request.

faqs.q: Do you offer evening appointments?
faqs.a: Limited evening slots may be available upon request.

faqs.q: Can you detect hidden leaks?
faqs.a: Yes, we use specialized equipment for leak detection.

faqs.q: Do you replace old plumbing systems?
faqs.a: Yes, we provide full system upgrades.

faqs.q: Can you install smart water systems?
faqs.a: Yes, smart monitoring solutions are available.

faqs.q: Do I need to be home during the repair?
faqs.a: Yes, access is required unless otherwise arranged.

faqs.q: How should I prepare for a visit?
faqs.a: Please clear the work area and ensure accessibility.
